--- complex_linear.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
LET x = 1
FOR y IN [1, 2]
FILTER WHERE x < y
RETURN y

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLLet{
            Let:   15,
            Items: []*ast.GQLLetItem{
              &ast.GQLLetItem{
                Ident: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 19,
                  NameEnd: 20,
                  Name:    "x",
                },
                Expr: &ast.IntLiteral{
                  ValuePos: 23,
                  ValueEnd: 24,
                  Base:     10,
                  Value:    "1",
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLFor{
            For:   25,
            Ident: &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 29,
              NameEnd: 30,
              Name:    "y",
            },
            Expr: &ast.ArrayLiteral{
              Array:  -1,
              Lbrack: 34,
              Rbrack: 39,
              Values: []ast.Expr{
                &ast.IntLiteral{
                  ValuePos: 35,
                  ValueEnd: 36,
                  Base:     10,
                  Value:    "1",
                },
                &ast.IntLiteral{
                  ValuePos: 38,
                  ValueEnd: 39,
                  Base:     10,
                  Value:    "2",
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLFilter{
            Filter: 41,
            Where:  48,
            Expr:   &ast.BinaryExpr{
              Op:   "<",
              Left: &ast.Ident{
                NamePos: 54,
                NameEnd: 55,
                Name:    "x",
              },
              Right: &ast.Ident{
                NamePos: 58,
                NameEnd: 59,
                Name:    "y",
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 60,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 67,
                  NameEnd: 68,
                  Name:    "y",
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph LET x = 1 FOR y IN [1, 2] FILTER WHERE x < y RETURN y
